lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

Note: colonisation has been patched repeatedly — range, economy maths, and the primary-port roster (the Dodec) have all changed since launch. Before any large commitment, cross-check current figures in-game and against a tool dated after the most recent update.

sources.label: Frontier
sources.what: Official System Colonisation guide — the authoritative claim procedure, ship roles, and costs.

sources.label: Colonization Mega Guide — CMDR Mechan
sources.what: Community master reference: construction-point maths, the economy & link systems, body-by-body site selection, population/scoring, and hauling. The deepest single source — much of this page's updated detail is cross-checked against it.

sources.label: Inara — Colonisation guide
sources.what: INARA's System Colonisation guide — colony claim walkthrough, build steps, and contractor logistics.

sources.label: Fandom — Colonisation
sources.what: Mechanics, patch history, the Aug-2025 economy rework, and the Dodec starport (largest buildable port).

sources.label: Raven Colonial
sources.what: Web planner & build tracker (pairs with SrvSurvey) — design and simulate a whole system, then track remaining commodities across every project and Fleet Carrier.

sources.label: EDColony
sources.what: Real-time colony-construction logistics companion — tracks the depot, remaining commodities, and trips per ship.

sources.label: AetherWave
sources.what: Colonisation guide series (construction, economy, hauling, reference tables) behind several of this page's figures.

sources.label: Ricardo's Gaming
sources.what: Hands-on first-colony walkthrough for the Trailblazers colonisation update.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Beginner walkthrough: claiming an unpopulated system, deploying the beacon, and running the construction-and-supply loop to stand up a first port.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Hands-on account of the post-Trailblazers colonisation loop: claiming, beacon deployment, and the commodity-supply grind to complete a first colony.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Feature explainer on the Trailblazers update: what System Colonisation is and why it matters for the galaxy, rather than a step-by-step build tutorial.

sources.label: YouTube — CMDR Mechan
sources.what: Tutorial walkthrough of the Raven Colonial planner: designing a system, simulating the build, and tracking the commodity haul.
